data.description:
## Description
Introduce a config section so each client configures which analyzer/tools run, the source scan root(s) (replacing the hardcoded src/rebar), the per-language tool mapping, and the size/complexity thresholds (replacing the rebar-only module-size cap file). Uses the existing `section.key` typed-schema mechanism.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] New config section (e.g. `[code_health]`) with keys: scan roots/globs, per-language analyzer/tool selection, size policy (cap/threshold), and enable flag.
- [ ] Sensible defaults; absent/blank config -> code_health reports Unavailable (never a hardcoded rebar path).
- [ ] `rebar -c code_health.<key>=<val>` overrides work through the existing CLI override path.
- [ ] Config documented in the typed schema module alongside existing sections.

## Verification
- [ ] Unit tests: default load, override parse, missing-section behavior.
- [ ] `make lint` + config schema tests.

## Dependencies: Child 1 (interface)
## Files likely touched: src/rebar/_config_schema (typed schema), src/rebar/config.py, tests/unit/test_code_health_config.py (new)
## Estimated scope: M (2-3 files)
data.title: Add a [code_health] config section: analyzer/tool selection, scan roots, thresholds
